source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geometric-humanist English product UI with Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for modular headings, body text, labels, numerals, tables, and compact Japanese workflows.
layout: Precise 8px component grids, seed-hole module rhythm, calm dashboard density, structured navigation, compact data tables, 8px cards, and pond-edge texture accents.

prompts.label: Transparent lotus seedpod motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a lotus seedpod, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: One mature lotus seedpod head from a pond-edge lotus plant, broad circular pod top with many recessed seed holes, a few visible brown seeds, olive green pod skin aging into seed brown at the rim, short natural stem, dry botanical texture, accurate lotus seedpod anatomy.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the pod or stem.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural olive pod, seed brown, and subtle leaf-green undertones.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no leaves, no flowers, no landscape, no water, no decorative background, no second subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Lotus Seedpod light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Lotus Seedpod", derived from the lotus seedpod cutout visible in this conversation. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible modular component system.
Reference motif: mature lotus seedpod, circular pod top with repeated recessed seed holes, olive lotus pod skin, seed-brown rims and seeds, muted leaf-green stem, dry botanical speckling, pond-edge neutrals.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class 3840x2160 source board, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lotus Seedpod, Lotus Seedpod, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Palette direction: olive lotus pod, seed brown, leaf green, pond-edge reed neutrals, warm clay, dry fiber tan, pod shadow, pale lotus pith, moss accent, and restrained near-neutrals derived from the motif only.
Typography: modular English product UI guidance with Japanese typography guidance; use a geometric/humanist Latin sans and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, numerals, and compact dashboard tables. Include short Japanese labels such as 種子, 池端, 検索, 状態.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, data table, command palette, search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, and component density notes.
Style: premium modular component system, light pond-edge interface, pale pith surfaces, seed-brown text, olive primary actions, leaf-green status accents, pod-hole modular rhythm, subtle circular seedpod texture, restrained shadows, 8px card radius.
Text: use short readable UI labels and section labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no one-note beige palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Lotus Seedpod", no tiny illegible paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Lotus Seedpod dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Lotus Seedpod". It must feel like the same modular component system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the lotus seedpod motif and the light board visible in this conversation.
Reference motif: mature lotus seedpod with repeated circular seed holes, olive pod surface, seed-brown rims and seeds, muted leaf-green stem, dry botanical speckling, pond-edge neutral context.
Reference light-board system details to preserve: olive primary controls, seed-brown foreground, pale lotus pith surfaces, moss/leaf green success accents, reed clay accents, pod-hole modular rhythm, precise dashboard/data/forms/table/search/status/token coverage, English and Japanese typography guidance.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class 3840x2160 source board, crisp readable labels, precise product UI grid.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lotus Seedpod, Dark Mode, Lotus Seedpod, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Typography: modular English product UI guidance with Japanese typography guidance; use a geometric/humanist Latin sans and Noto Sans JP / Japanese Gothic guidance for headings, body, labels, numerals, and compact dashboard tables. Include short Japanese labels such as 種子, 池端, 検索, 状態.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, top navigation, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, data table, command palette, search filters, empty state, loading state, error state, success state, warning state, toast, pagination, and simple icons.
Token coverage: shadcn/tweakcn semantic color roles, chart tokens, sidebar tokens, border, input, ring, spacing scale, 8px radius family, shadow scale, texture swatches, focus states, hover states, disabled states, and component density notes.
Visual details: deep seed-brown background, elevated panels in pod shadow and dark olive, pale pith foreground text, muted reed labels, olive primary actions, moss/leaf green status accents, warm clay warning, subtle circular seed-hole texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls, 8px card radius.
Text: use short readable UI labels and section labels only; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure flat black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Lotus Seedpod", no tiny illegible paragraphs.
